MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANT ALAN HONNIBALL INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA MAIN ACT PRODUCTIONS' Motion For An Order Determining Good Faith Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Alan Honniball's unopposed Motion for Order Determining Good Faith Settlement is granted. Specifically, the settlement between Plaintiff Gunn and Defendant Alan Honniball individually and dba Main Act Productions, attached to the declaration of Holly A. Graves, was made in good faith pursuant to CCP section 877.6. Further, all other defendants and parties are barred from pursuing a claim against Defendant Alan Honniball individually and dba Main Act Productions for equitable contribution, or partial or comparative indemnity, based on comparative negligence or comparative fault in this case.

Counsel for the defendant is to prepare and submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.
